raw_consumer_statement:
Citi XXXX Account Number : XXXX I cancelled two device orders from the merchant Redmagic after purchasing with my Citi XXXX  credit card ( see Exhibit C ). 

In both instances, the merchandise was returned, and the merchant has explicitly stated in writing that they will accept the chargebacks. However, Citibank has denied my dispute for one device ( Dispute Reference XXXX, see Exhibit C ) and are still processing the second dispute ( Dispute Reference XXXX ). I want Citibank to honor the chargebacks just as the merchant said they would in their correspondence to me.

Claim 1 ( Appeal of Denied Dispute ) : {$840.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX ( Order # XXXX ) Transaction Date : XX/XX/year> Dispute Reference : XXXX The Error : Citibank improperly reversed the conditional credit.

The Evidence : See EXHIBIT A, B - Per the merchant 's explicit instructions, I refused the parcel on XX/XX/year> and the merchant confirmed it was in transit back to their original warehouse on XX/XX/year>. This is proof that I am no longer in possession of the merchandise, which was the reason stated for the denial of my dispute by Citibank. On XX/XX/year>, XXXX stated in writing : " Please rest assured that XXXX will not contest your bank-initiated chargeback, and we will accurately confirm the full sequence of events to your bank as you outlined. '' Claim 2 ( Statutory Notice for Pending Dispute ) : {$610.00} XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX ( Order # XXXX ) Transaction Date : XX/XX/year> Dispute Reference : XXXX The Error : I am invoking my 60-day FCBA right to withhold payment on this canceled and returned order.

The Evidence : See EXHIBIT A - Per the merchants explicit instructions, I returned the parcel to their authorized facility in XXXX, TX on XX/XX/year>. See EXHIBIT B - The parcel arrived at their facility on XX/XX/year>. See EXHIBIT A - On XX/XX/year>, XXXX confirmed in writing : " We confirm that you have initiated a chargeback for the full amount for your order ( # XXXX ), and we have accepted it. ''
